tasks.prompt: Abra https://www.npmjs.com/package/typescript e retorne o título da página, URL final e 3 dados visíveis na interface web. Não use npm view nem endpoints do registry.npmjs.org.
bashCommands: node --input-type=module -e "import { connect } from './packages/web-skills/skills/web-browser/scripts/cdp.js'; const c=await connect(); const pages=await c.getPages(); console.log(JSON.stringify(pages.map(p=>({id:p.targetId,title:p.title,url:p.url})),null,2)); c.close();"

node --input-type=module -e "import { connect } from './packages/web-skills/skills/web-browser/scripts/cdp.js'; const c=await connect(); const pages=await c.getPages(); const page=[...pages].reverse().find(p=>p.url.includes('/package/typescript')); if(!page){throw new Error('typescript tab not found');} const s=await c.attachToPage(page.targetId); const text=await c.evaluate(s, '(async()=>document.body.innerText.slice(0,1800))()'); console.log(text); c.close();"

node --input-type=module -e "import { connect } from './packages/web-skills/skills/web-browser/scripts/cdp.js'; const c=await connect(); const page=[...(await c.getPages())].reverse().find(p=>p.url.includes('/package/typescript')); const s=await c.attachToPage(page.targetId); const headings=await c.evaluate(s, '(async()=>Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(\"h1,h2,h3\")).map(e=>e.textContent.trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0,20))()'); console.log(JSON.stringify(headings,null,2)); c.close();"

node --input-type=module -e "import { connect } from './packages/web-skills/skills/web-browser/scripts/cdp.js'; const c=await connect(); const page=[...(await c.getPages())].reverse().find(p=>p.url.includes('/package/typescript')); const s=await c.attachToPage(page.targetId); const data=await c.evaluate(s, `(() => { const txt=document.body.innerText; const firstNonEmptyAfter=(label)=>{ const i=txt.indexOf(label); if(i===-1) return null; const after=txt.slice(i+label.length).split(/\n/).map(l=>l.trim()).filter(Boolean); return after[0]||null; }; return { title: document.title, url: location.href, packageName: (document.querySelector('h2')?.textContent||'').trim() || null, weeklyDownloads: firstNonEmptyAfter('Weekly Downloads'), version: firstNonEmptyAfter('Version'), license: firstNonEmptyAfter('License') }; })()`); console.log(JSON.stringify(data,null,2)); c.close();"
